description: Binance India Futures Trading AMA featuring Aaron Gong, discussing Binance Futures, trading processes, and upcoming tournaments. Key topics include the introduction of Binance Futures, differences between USDT and coin margin futures, and user participation in trading tournaments.
topic_summary: Aaron Gong introduces Binance Futures and explains trading processes, including registration and participation in tournaments. He discusses product offerings and differences between futures types, addressing common user questions [t=0:24 - t=421:88].
